name: All Purpose Pickling Solution
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Salt per quart of water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cucumbers in a pan.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Prick the cucumbers with a fork.
4. Add cucumbers to the pickling solution.
5. Put into jars and seal.
6. Let stand for 3 weeks before eating.
